name: create-teavm-app-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the create-teavm-app scaffolding tool — generates full-stack TeaVM + Cloud Run + Firebase applications

plugins.name: create-teavm-app
plugins.description: Scaffold a full-stack TeaVM + Cloud Run + Firebase application with a single command. Generates multi-module Maven projects with API backend, frontend SPA, processor services, Docker Compose, and GitHub Actions workflows.
